title: Lesson 57: The many uses of 'Lo'
concepts: 'Lo' can be almost a complete phrase in itself if it is used in the right place. In fact it can be more than one phrase. In this lesson we;ll look at what 'lo' can mean besides 'it'

sentences.spanish: Lo interesante es que viven aquí
sentences.english: The interesting thing is that they live here

sentences.spanish: Lo interesante es que viven juntos
sentences.english: The interesting thing is that they live together

sentences.spanish: Lo facíl es que vienen juntos
sentences.english: The easy thing is that they come together

sentences.spanish: Lo complicado es que vienen juntos
sentences.english: The complicated thing is that they come together

sentences.spanish: Hablamos sobre lo de la fiesta
sentences.english: We are speaking about the thing about the party

sentences.spanish: Hablamos de lo de la fiesta
sentences.english: We are speaking of the thing about the party

sentences.spanish: No quiero hablar sobre lo de Juan así
sentences.english: I don't want to speak about the thing about Juan like this
I want to organize that thing tomorrow
... but I don't want to organize it like this
